page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg9i.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor. Operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz, this instance provides 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs, utilizing a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. This dedicated CPU allocation ensures that compute resources are not shared with other tenants, delivering consistent processing performance without virtualization overhead.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per vCPU. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps to handle external and internal data transfers. There is no local storage bundled with this instance, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external network-attached block storage. No graphics processing units are included in this configuration.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high clock speed position this instance as a premium resource-dense option for workloads requiring predictable CPU performance. The balanced CPU-to-RAM ratio makes it suitable for general-purpose workloads, application servers, and medium-sized databases that demand stable compute power and moderate memory capacity without requiring local NVMe storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg9i.8xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and 32 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.4 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration and dedicated CPU allocation, it delivers stable, non-shared compute performance. The system includes 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core, alongside a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. This instance does not include local storage or GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage for data persistence. It is designed for workloads requiring consistent CPU performance and a balanced memory profile, such as application servers, containerized microservices, and database hosting.
